title: Sadhimataji’s temple
tagline: Sadhimataji’s temple — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Sadhimataji temple is a Hindu temple located at Kherva village in Mehsana District of Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Sadhimataji temple is a Hindu temple located at Kherva village in Mehsana District of Gujarat, India. Sadhimataji temple is 2.5 km south of Kherva village located in Kherva on Mehsana-Kalol, Gandhinagar Highway.

topPlaces.name: Kherva
topPlaces.description: Kherva is a village in the Mehsana district, Gujarat, India, situated on State Highway 73 between Gandhinagar and Mehsana. It borders the following villages: Devarasan, Kadavasan, Mulsan, Jagudan, Sanganpur, Punasan, Hebuva, Udalpur, Gunjala, Dharusan, and Dhamnava.

topPlaces.name: Shree Jaykorbai Vidyamandir
topPlaces.description: Shree Jaykorbai Vidymandir is a co-education high school in Mehsana district, Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Akhaj
topPlaces.description: Akhaj is a village in Mehsana Taluka of Mehsana district in the state of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Ucharpi
topPlaces.description: Ucharpi is a village in Mehsana district in the Indian state of Gujarat. A village of the Anjana Chaudhari caste, it is situated on the bank of the Khari river.

topPlaces.name: Varetha
topPlaces.description: Varetha is a village in Kheralu Taluka in Mahesana district of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sadhimataji’s temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sadhimataji’s temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sadhimataji’s temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sadhimataji’s temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sadhimataji’s temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sadhimataji’s temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sadhimataji’s temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sadhimataji’s temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kherva, Shree Jaykorbai Vidyamandir, Akhaj, Ucharpi, Varetha.
